data.body: Fix applied: added tool-use-*.jsonl scanning to hook_friction_suggestion_check in plugins/dso/hooks/lib/session-misc-functions.sh. Reads today's $HOME/.claude/logs/tool-use-$(date +%Y-%m-%d).jsonl, counts post hook entries, triggers suggestion when count >= suggestion.tool_use_count_threshold (default 200). Fail-open: skips gracefully if file absent or malformed. RED test added to tests/hooks/test-stop-suggestion-hook.sh (3 new test cases: high-volume triggers, below-threshold no-trigger, absent-file no-crash). All 13 tests GREEN.
